creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text: It so happened that I recently had to purchase a new keyboard (Cooler Master CMStorm) for a feature I needed - LED backlights. The new keyboard is fairly expensive, and unfortunately, the stickiness problem persists with the new keyboard too. It will be nice if I could get an update via email whether a future version of FreeBSD (hopefully 11.0) will address this bug. I would surely like to upgrade to the newer release if this problem can be settled for good. Thanks.
